summary: Iteration 76 - Frontend testing of UX fix for 'Faire le point' > 'Reversement' signature flow. The fix allows signing in 1 click without requiring a prior 'Enregistrer' (save) step. ALL TESTS PASSED. The new UX flow works correctly: (1) signPoint() auto-saves if form is dirty, (2) handleSignClick() auto-applies billettage to cash_amount, (3) 0.5 F tolerance on float equality, (4) Sign button visible even without currentPoint.

issues: React hydration warnings: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - This is a React internal warning from the preview environment that doesn't affect functionality

React hydration warning: '
cannot be a descendant of

' in Badge component - Minor HTML nesting issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Line 168-201: signPoint() now auto-saves if form is dirty before signing - WORKING
Line 212-233: handleSignClick() auto-applies billettage to cash_amount instead of blocking - WORKING
Line 207-210: cashMatches uses 0.5 F tolerance for float comparison - WORKING
Line 551: Sign button visible even without currentPoint (computedTotal > 0 check) - WORKING
The 1-click signature flow is now functional - no need to click 'Enregistrer' before 'Signer'
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test financial point for week 20/04/2026 - 26/04/2026 with cash_amount=10000, mobile_amount=5000, billettage={10000: 1}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 verified the UX fix for 'Faire le point' > 'Reversement' signature flow. The fix removes the friction of requiring 'Enregistrer' before 'Signer'. Key behaviors verified: (1) Sign button works without prior save - auto-saves internally, (2) Billettage auto-applied to cash_amount when clicking Sign, (3) cash_amount=0 (only mobile money) opens consent modal directly without billettage requirement, (4) cash_amount>0 but billettage not filled shows warning toast and opens billettage section. Test data was cleaned up (deleted). Key data-testids: fp-save-btn, fp-sign-btn, fp-toggle-billettage, fp-bill-10000, fp-apply-billettage, fp-consent-checkbox, fp-confirm-sign-btn, fp-admin-validate-btn, fp-delete-btn.

ux_fix_verification.original_issue: User had to click 'Enregistrer' (save) before 'Signer' (sign) - confusing UX
ux_fix_verification.fix_applied: signPoint() now auto-saves if form is dirty, handleSignClick() auto-applies billettage
ux_fix_verification.conclusion: The 'Signer' button now works in 1 click without requiring a prior 'Enregistrer' click. The UX fix is successful.
